summary: Tested ProviderClientDetail.tsx refactoring (PrenatalVisitSection extraction). Verified: Login works, Client Detail page loads correctly with all sections (Prenatal Visits, Labor Records, Birth Record), Report button IS visible and functional (contrary to previous iteration claim), PDF download API returns 200 with valid PDF.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attribute on TouchableOpacity not rendered in DOM (React Native Web uses testID, not data-testid)

issues: Report and Edit buttons are positioned at y=1034, requiring significant scroll to view (near bottom of long page)

action_items: NONE CRITICAL - All functionality working as expected
OPTIONAL: Consider using testID instead of data-testid for React Native Web compatibility

PrenatalVisitSection.tsx extracted correctly and imports working
All three midwife sections (Prenatal, Labor, Birth) render and function correctly
Report button IS rendering (previous iteration report was incorrect - button just needs scrolling to view)
